name: auto-ppt-prototype
description: Python-first smart layer for planning, revising, validating, and rendering PowerPoint decks through a Node PPTX renderer.

actions.name: create
actions.description: Create a new deck from a natural-language prompt

actions.name: revise
actions.description: Revise an existing deck JSON based on a natural-language instruction

sources.description: Optional trusted source materials that are converted into planning context before create or revise flows.

deckMetadata.sourceDisplayMode: Deck output defaults to notes so sources remain off-slide while still being visible to the presenter in PowerPoint notes.
deckMetadata.slideSources: Each slide may include structured sources for traceability and later audit/export workflows.
